titles.title: Who Is Knocking At Your Heart Today?

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who is knocking at your heart today? Let the Savior in; Sinner, do not grieve the Lord away, Will you let Him in?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let Him in, let Him in, Sinner, rise, let Him in.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is ling’ring at the closed door, Let the Savior in; You have heard Him knocking o’er and o’er, Will you let Him in?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He has long protected you from death, Let the Savior in; Don’t refuse the Lord who gives you breath, Will you let Him in?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: On the cross His blood was shed so free, Let the Savior in; Do not let your will thus dormant be, Will you let Him in?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Is your heart now like the granite stone? Let the Savior in; Soon His blood for you will not atone, Will you let Him in?
